must_detect.matched_text: Term Sheet: Proposed Strategic Acquisition of PT Nusantara PayTek by PT Arunika Teknologi Tbk (public company listed on Bursa Efek Indonesia)
Structure: Buyer to acquire 80% of issued shares from existing shareholders; closing subject to approval under POJK 17/2020 and shareholder approval at RUPS Luar Biasa

HR & Onboarding: No change to employment terms on closing; onboarding forms will omit optional fields and will not collect national ID copies beyond legally required KYC; no pre-closing cross-border transfers of HR data will be conducted

Fintech Operations: PT Nusantara PayTek provides payment gateway services consistent with Bank Indonesia registration; no expansion of personal data categories is contemplated prior to closing; AFPI code of conduct adherence maintained

Securities Matters: No new issuance, rights offering, or warrant adjustments are contemplated in this transaction; settlement and share recording to be coordinated via KSEI; no changes to dividend policy are proposed
